name: rss-keyword-monitor
description: Preview RSS, Atom, and RDF keyword or regex matches through Telemark Digital's Apify Actor.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded RSS and Atom keyword discovery.
interface.longDescription: Preview keyword, regex, and exclusion matches from RSS, Atom, or RDF feeds, then use the published Apify Task workflows when recurring only-new delivery is needed.
defaultPrompt: Preview AI stories from these RSS feeds.
Find regex matches in these Atom feeds.
